completed_work.description: Fixed pickup info mismatch - checkout, confirmation, order status pages now use env vars
commits: fix: resolve require() error in order-status page build
fix: use env vars for shop address across checkout, emails, and order pages

completed_work.description: Fixed track order placeholder - changed from 'ABC123' to 'ORD-001' format
Fixed email address - all email templates now use dynamic shop address
Fixed order lookup case sensitivity - using Prisma mode: 'insensitive'

decisions.decision: Used Prisma mode: 'insensitive' for case-insensitive order number matching
decisions.rationale: Order numbers stored as ORD-001 but users might type in various cases

decisions.decision: Split order-status into server page.tsx and client OrderStatusContent.tsx
decisions.rationale: Avoid require() errors while preserving env var access in server component

next_action: Resume with '/gsd:resume-work' or execute infrastructure plan 02-02 when ready
context_notes: All three reported issues have been fixed and committed. Pickup info now uses SHOP_ADDRESS_LINE1/2 env vars across all pages. Order number placeholder shows correct ORD-001 format. Email templates use dynamic shop address. Phase 02-01 is complete. Next steps require human action for Vercel/Neon infrastructure setup (plan 02-02), followed by production validation (plan 02-03).
